name: subject-not-vec-error
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :FirstNonZeroSubjectNotVec
  :message "firstNonZero requires Vec of Numbers subject, got number"
  :operand "firstNonZero"
  :position "subject"
  :expectedType "Vec of Numbers"
  :actualType :number
  :actualValue 42
  :fault {:step ~{firstNonZero} :input 42}
  :trail null
}

name: subject-string-error
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :FirstNonZeroSubjectNotVec
  :message "firstNonZero requires Vec of Numbers subject, got string"
  :operand "firstNonZero"
  :position "subject"
  :expectedType "Vec of Numbers"
  :actualType :string
  :actualValue "abc"
  :fault {:step ~{firstNonZero} :input "abc"}
  :trail null
}

subject-set-error

  :kind :type-error

  :message "firstNonZero requires Vec of Numbers subject, got null"
  :operand "firstNonZero"
  :position "subject"
  :expectedType "Vec of Numbers"
  :actualType :null
  :actualValue null
  :fault {:step ~{firstNonZero} :input null}
  :trail null
}
